name: Beacon Minerals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 47% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5000, stop A$1.8661, target A$3.0600 (0.88:1) — then trail it.
